content:
This Week in Spring - July 14th, 2026

In two short months, on this date in September, Java 27 will be here! Who's excited? I'm excited!

I'm in delightful Denver, CO, for the amazing UberConf. I just delivered a workshop that was scheduled from 09:00 to 17:00, but it went into overtime, and we just concluded at 18:30. Long day (story of my life)! Such a nice way to spend the day, though. Surrounded by cool people. As usual, though, the Spring ecosystem waits for no one. Let's dive right into this amazing week in Spring!

• I did a video you might like, and I really hope you'll watch it, looking at what motivates Spring Framework and how we approach building things with it.

• In last week's installment of A Bootiful Podcast, I talked to Spring Boot teammate Moritz Halbritter.

• Loic Mathieu has a nice post on some of the amazing new features in Java 27

• I can't believe I missed this: my friend and architecture extraordinairre Gregor Hohpe has an amazing interview on being an architect

• Craig Walls is back with an amazing post on applying semantic guardrails

• And another one by Craig Walls, this one on safeguarding LLM output

• I love this: Spring AI AgentCore 2.0.0 is available

• I loved this article on scaling Java-based real-time systems

• InfoQ had a nice post way back in April on the concepts going beyond RAG in an AI application with Spring Boot
